steps.name: Navigate to the [Products] page

Add products to cart: [Sleeveless Dress, Beautiful Peacock Blue Cotton Linen Saree, Pure Cotton V-Neck T-Shirt, Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress, Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink, Summer White Top, Men Tshirt, Frozen Tops For Kids, Green Side Placket Detail T-Shirt, GRAPHIC DESIGN MEN T SHIRT - BLUE]
Add product [Sleeveless Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Sleeveless Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Close notification

Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Beautiful Peacock Blue Cotton Linen Saree
